_doc: Hidden zombie spawn point. EnemySystem queries entities tagged 'zombie-spawn' at boot to build its spawn registry; new zombies emerge from a randomly-chosen point each cycle. The mesh is hidden at factory creation in main.js (player-facing visuals removed per locked input #2 — players were wall-trapping the visible cemeteries). No Health → indestructible. The 'spawn-hidden' tag tells main.js to flip mesh.visible=false + disable LavaHoleSystem ticking after registration. Adding more spawn points is a 1-line edit in level-prototype.json — no system changes needed.
